typecheck.summary: Success: no issues found in 44 source files

lint.summary: 11 E402 errors in benchmarks/run_compat_checks.py: module-level imports not at top of file due to `from __future__ import annotations` placed before module docstring

reviewsSummary.note: Feature review not performed because lint validator failed

blockingIssues.description: benchmarks/run_compat_checks.py has 11 E402 ruff lint errors. The file places `from __future__ import annotations` on line 1 before the module docstring (lines 2-10), causing all subsequent imports (lines 12-22) to be flagged as E402 (module-level import not at top of file). Fix: either move `from __future__ import annotations` after the docstring or add a `# noqa: E402` comment, or restructure the file header so imports follow PEP 257 order.
